record.field: [(1, '=', 1)] if (user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_payroll_specialist') or user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_co') or user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_manager')) else (['|', ('employee_id.supervision_type', 'in', ['myself', 'direct', 'indirect', 'indirect_to_subordinate']), ('employee_id.job_id.access_history_user_ids', 'in', user.id)] if user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_recruiter') else [('employee_id.supervision_type', 'in', ['myself', 'direct', 'indirect', 'indirect_to_subordinate'])])

[(1, '=', 1)] if (user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_payroll_specialist') or user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_co') or user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_manager')) else (['|', ('employee_id.supervision_type', 'in', ['myself', 'direct', 'indirect', 'indirect_to_subordinate']), ('employee_id.job_id.access_history_user_ids', 'in', user.id)] if user.has_group('ab_hr.group_ab_hr_recruiter') else [('employee_id.supervision_type', 'in', ['myself', 'direct', 'indirect', 'indirect_to_subordinate'])])
